title: Savory Crunchy Spanish Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: This dish is a salty and comforting fusion of tamarind pulp with crispy Spanish chickpeas, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Drain and rinse the chickpeas. Pat them dry with a paper towel.
Combine the drained chickpeas, unsalted peanuts, and about half of a tamarind pulp in a large mixing bowl.
Spread the chickpea-peanut mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crunchy.
Let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
